content.text: Monday decision: feature flags expire after 30 days unless renewed.
Noted Monday 30-day expiry rule.
Tuesday exception: experiment flags for project Helix can last 90 days.
Noted temporary Helix 90-day exception.
Wednesday correction: the Helix 90-day exception was cancelled after compliance review.
Thursday final rule: all feature flags, including Helix, expire after 14 days. Only security emergency flags can last 72 hours maximum and must be named sec-emergency-*.
If memory mentions 30 days or Helix 90 days, it is stale. Current rule is Thursday final.
Distractor 1: discussed unrelated release train, flags UI copy, and old 30/90 day examples.
